'''Ur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="JKTCG2" /> [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> who lived on the [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="Databank" /> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="timeline">The [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of the ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'' is centered around the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].</ref> He was famous for [[Death/Legends|slaying]] two [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|guards]] during a territorial skirmish with the<ref name="JKTCG" /> [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|130|Jabba the Hutt (Jabba Desilijic Tiure)}}</ref> [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> Ur had a younger brother named [[Urur]], who was restricted to defending their [[Ur's tribe|tribe]]. If Ur was killed, Urur would take his place within the tribe.<ref name="JKTCG2" /> Ur wore desert-[[Color/Legends|colored]] robes with two [[Bandolier/Legends|bandoliers]] strapped diagonally across both sides of the chest above the [[Belt/Legends|belt]], and the standard Tusken mask. He wielded a [[Gaderffii/Legends|Gaderffii]]. Ur preferred [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]] meat over other Tatooine fare.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ur was first mentioned on a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'',<ref name="JKTCG" /> simultaneously with his brother Urur's accompanying card.<ref name="JKTCG2" />
